text:
Blackout Curtain (, rom. Burakkuauto Kāten) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. It allows a player to protect themselves from the next "Peek" or "Fluoroscopy" cast on them.
__NOTOC__

|

Summary

After being cast, this spell negates the effect of the next "Peek" or "Fluoroscopy" used on the player, after which it is dispelled. The effect is not cumulative, so trying to cast a second "Blackout Curtain" while the first one is still active will cause the second to fail.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1025 :: 
このカードを使用すると他プレイヤーからの「窃盗」「透視」を１回防ぐことができる。（「暗幕」の効果が継続中に、もう１枚「暗幕」を使用しても、効果は２回分にはならない。）
|-
![Eng]
|No.1025 :: Blackout Curtain 
This card when used on a player, it is able to defend against an attack from “Thief” and “Fluoroscopy”. (“Blackout Curtain”'s effect continuation is used once, it will not help a 2 times.)
|}

Trivia

This spell was first seen being cast in Chapter 151, when a hostile "Fluoroscopy" forced Gon to renew his protection.
